recentTickets.ticket_description: Customer cannot sign in after password reset and needs urgent access to the portal.
recentTickets.resolution_summary: Reset credentials, clear stale sessions, and confirm successful sign-in.
recentTickets.ai_summary: Login Issue for Aarav Sharma: Customer cannot sign in after password reset and needs urgent access to the portal.
recentTickets.ai_root_cause: Session token expiry and password reset friction
recentTickets.ai_suggested_resolution: Reset credentials, clear stale sessions, and confirm successful sign-in.

recentTickets.ticket_description: Customer reports payment was debited but the product still shows unpaid.
recentTickets.resolution_summary: Verify bank reference, reconcile payment status, and restore subscription access.
recentTickets.ai_summary: Payment Failure for Maya Mehta: Customer reports payment was debited but the product still shows unpaid.
recentTickets.ai_root_cause: Payment gateway timeout after bank debit confirmation
recentTickets.ai_suggested_resolution: Verify bank reference, reconcile payment status, and restore subscription access.

recentTickets.ticket_description: Customer is waiting for a refund update after cancelling a subscription renewal.
recentTickets.resolution_summary: Confirm eligibility, share refund timeline, and monitor finance approval.
recentTickets.ai_summary: Refund Request for Kabir Khan: Customer is waiting for a refund update after cancelling a subscription renewal.
recentTickets.ai_root_cause: Refund approval waiting for billing reconciliation
recentTickets.ai_suggested_resolution: Confirm eligibility, share refund timeline, and monitor finance approval.

recentTickets.ticket_description: Customer account was suspended and they need the reason and restoration steps.
recentTickets.resolution_summary: Review policy trigger, request verification, and restore access when cleared.
recentTickets.ai_summary: Account Suspension for Nisha Das: Customer account was suspended and they need the reason and restoration steps.
recentTickets.ai_root_cause: Automated policy rule flagged account activity
recentTickets.ai_suggested_resolution: Review policy trigger, request verification, and restore access when cleared.

recentTickets.ticket_description: Customer noticed suspicious login activity and wants the account secured.
recentTickets.resolution_summary: Secure the account, rotate credentials, and enable two-factor authentication.
recentTickets.ai_summary: Security Concern for Riya Kapoor: Customer noticed suspicious login activity and wants the account secured.
recentTickets.ai_root_cause: Unrecognized login attempt triggered risk controls
recentTickets.ai_suggested_resolution: Secure the account, rotate credentials, and enable two-factor authentication.

recentTickets.ticket_description: Customer says the dashboard is loading slowly during business hours.
recentTickets.resolution_summary: Escalate slow dashboard trace and advise retry after cache refresh.
recentTickets.ai_summary: Performance Issue for Dev Singh: Customer says the dashboard is loading slowly during business hours.
recentTickets.ai_root_cause: Dashboard query latency during peak usage window
recentTickets.ai_suggested_resolution: Escalate slow dashboard trace and advise retry after cache refresh.

recentTickets.ticket_description: Customer encountered a crash while uploading a file in the portal.
recentTickets.resolution_summary: Capture reproduction steps, attach logs, and route to platform engineering.
recentTickets.ai_summary: Bug Report for Ishaan Bose: Customer encountered a crash while uploading a file in the portal.
recentTickets.ai_root_cause: Client-side validation path failed for an edge case
recentTickets.ai_suggested_resolution: Capture reproduction steps, attach logs, and route to platform engineering.

recentTickets.ticket_description: Customer wants to cancel because recent issues delayed their operations.
recentTickets.resolution_summary: Offer retention support, explain options, and process cancellation if confirmed.

recentTickets.ai_suggested_resolution: Offer retention support, explain options, and process cancellation if confirmed.

strategicRecommendations: Stabilize payment reconciliation for debited-but-failed cases.
Prioritize high-churn enterprise customers with SLA breach recovery.
Create proactive login and security guidance for repeat incidents.
Review refund communication templates to reduce repeat contacts.

securityAlerts.message: Two suspicious login attempts blocked for users.
One inactive user should be reviewed.
